_README: Seed registry of Chipotle-sponsored STREAM events that need OCR. Built from a backtest of the competitor's 3-month code history: on-screen 888222 codes come from FGC/esports majors. Golf (@PGATOUR) codes are TEXT-posted and handled by the Twitter engine, so they are NOT listed here. Confirm channel + exact stream window near each date; 'candidate' = sponsorship/channel not yet verified. The future supervisor will auto-run evo_ocr_monitor.py during each window.

events.name: Evo 2026 Finals (Day 3)
events.notes: Presented by Chipotle. GLE538 caught on-screen here 6/27. SF6 finals 6:30pm PT, Tekken 2pm PT.

events.name: Get On My Level 2026 (Canadian FGC Champs)
events.notes: FGC major. Confirm Chipotle sponsorship + Twitch channel + finals times closer to date.

events.name: CEO 2026
events.notes: Major SF6 event in Orlando. Channel likely twitch.tv/ceogaming. Confirm Chipotle drops.

events.name: BITE 8 (Beast in the East)
events.notes: Regional FGC major. Confirm sponsorship + channel.

handled_elsewhere.golf_PGATOUR: Text-posted by @PGATOUR on PGA tournament days (Thu-Sun) -> caught by the Twitter engine, no OCR needed.
handled_elsewhere.creator_vanity: Sporadic Team-Chipotle creator streams (CHIPOTLEBOYS etc.) -> not predictable; Twitter wide-net is the backstop.
